series_metadata.series_title: Notary Complaints, Investigations, Disciplinary Determinations and Administrative Hearing Case Files
series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, complaints received against notaries public, communication with investigators, reports filed by investigators, disciplinary determinations, documents created and received during the administrative hearing process in compliance with Chapter 119 of the Revised Code. Files may include notices of opportunity for hearing, hearing requests, hearing scheduling letters, hearing examiner reports of recommendation, final orders and other correspondence and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seventy-five (75) years ; Electronic: seventy-five (75) years
